data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Endpoint lifecycle controls and metadata', but the evidence provided does not include any specific records or details that demonstrate the existence or functionality of these controls. The linked use case mentions the need for these controls, yet no concrete evidence was presented to confirm their implementation. This results in a clear gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of endpoint lifecycle controls and metadata provided.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
